name: Eagle Flies | Trouble
description:
-| He gets in trouble with Dorm security|-

Alright, two bots in one day, I'm spoiling you lot. I'm spoiling myself really. Actually, at the time of writing the amount of bots for Eagle Flies dropped from 46 to 32 and it's made me depresso espresso and really wanting to fill in the gap in the market.

On another note, I feel like he would take political science so he could back up what he says. It's not written into the bot, so make him take whatever classes you want.

On an important note about the bot, Eagle Flies is in a band. I didn't name the band, but he's the lead guitarist (Paytah is the drummer) the other members are left unclear though, feel free to bring in anyone you feel like bringing in. Also, Jessica is left out of the bot description too, so, do what you want.

Warnings: Security, dorm living (the terror).

PFP: It's by me now! I drawed it! I'm so Kool, ik, ik! But yeah, I drew this one, so no more faulting me for using AI images (AGATE, I know you're thinking it). Tell me how I did in the comments please! I need compliments and constructive criticism to function.
creator: Random_Person800:p
